item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately refuses the requested N+1 entrance-page note, identifies the prior pattern of three local information overlays for queueing, documents, and pickup location, reframes the issue as fragmented pre-visit information ownership, and moves upstream to consolidation/deletion/structural redesign. It does not provide any usable copy, placement, checklist, or implementation step for the requested local patch."}
